content.en:
The inheritance of the Doomsday Exaltation.

Ye Tian came in, but he didn't see other powerhouses, everyone should have been separated, and they were in different ultimate voids.

He was now in a special land, filled with the smell of the end of death and ruins.

Suddenly.

A voice came.

"The first level of the assessment, surviving an ultimate era in the ultimate land of the end of the world. "

Survive.

It may seem simple, but it's definitely not easy.

Bang!!!

Countless doomsday ultimate powers condensed and turned into huge doomsday figures, killing him one after another.

The strength of these figures, each of which was equivalent to the weakest Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

Ye Tian fought with these doomsday figures, and the strength of these doomsday figures was not as good as him, but there were quite a few of them, which posed a huge threat to him for a while.

Fight!

Fight!

Or fight!

Ye Tian desperately used the ultimate killing move, and all kinds of ultimate bodies were urged with all his might, but these doomsday figures were too difficult to deal with.

In desperation, he still fled for his life, and at his speed, these doomsday figures could not catch up with him for a while.

Suddenly.

As he shuttled through, he touched a ray of light, and his arm was shattered.

"What kind of light is this?"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

Under such a light, his ultimate body was directly shattered like a crispy skin.

After that, he continued to flee.

came to a black fog area again, and his body was still a little unbearable, so he could only choose to bypass.

"This first level assessment is so difficult, I don't know how many ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords will fall, and the inheritance land of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable is really extremely dangerous!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

The ultimate place of supreme inheritance, a void.

An ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord was besieged by a large number of doomsday figures, and he couldn't escape at all, so he was directly killed.

As time passed, more and more ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lords and Hao-level Ultimate Realm Masters fell, and after they fell, their bodies were absorbed by the Ultimate Land.

The Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords in the outside world could clearly sense the changes in the Ultimate Land, and they knew that many Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords had fallen, and they all showed a look of joy.

Even if all those ancient levels fell, they wouldn't feel distressed.

Time passed slowly, and more and more ancient and heroic levels fell.

Finally, an end of time has passed.

......

"It's finally time to spend an ultimate era, and the first assessment has passed!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

In this ultimate era, he was on the run, encountering danger many times, and almost died a few times.

But from beginning to end, he didn't condense the copy body, and he didn't dare to condense it, in case he condensed a copy body and caused a change in the assessment, it would not be good.

Fortunately, he finally passed the first test.

Airplanes!!!!

He had been moved to a large hall, where there were some other Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, but the Lords were not here.

Ye Tian glanced at it and found that the number of ancient levels was much less, at least about forty percent less, and this was almost halfway there!

In just the first assessment, forty percent of the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord fell, what a huge number this must be.

"The Ultimate Land has lost too many Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords this time, those Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters should know about the situation of the Doomsday Extreme Inheritance Land, but they only said that it was dangerous, but they didn't really disclose the situation, and this time they took the initiative to make it public, a bit like deliberate. Ye Tian said darkly.

When the other Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters saw that there were so many Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters missing at once, their faces changed, so many Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters died in the first level, so how much would they lose in the second level?

Soon.

The assessment of the second level is coming.

"Please enter the Doomsday Prison and come out of the Doomsday Prison to survive. "

Airplanes!

There are dense doomsday prisons all around, and each ancient level can choose a doomsday prison, these doomsday prisons seem to be the same, but in fact there are some differences.

Therefore, choosing the Doomsday Prison is also a hidden assessment, and if you choose the Doomsday Prison that is difficult to get out, it is your own problem.

Soon, there will be an ancient level choice, if you start slowly, some of the doomsday prisons that are easy to break will be snatched away.

Rumble!!!!

Two ancient level took a fancy to the same doomsday prison, but the weaker one was directly blown away by a move, and the other ancient level entered smoothly.

Wow!

Ye Tian also moved and entered a doomsday prison.

This doomsday prison is condensed by countless rays of light, and it is a twelve-sided diamond shape, and it contains many ultimate rule powers inside.

Ye Tian tried to attack.

Rumble!

The Doomsday Prison does not move.

It's easy to get in, but hard to get out.

The same is true for the other Ultimate Realm Lords, who can't go out anymore.

Immediately, one by one, they began to comprehend.

The assessment time of the second level is one hundred ultimate era time, which is quite sufficient, but if you can't get out, you will be wiped out.

At this time.

Some of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters have already begun to regret it, they shouldn't have come if they knew it, the danger here is far beyond their imagination, if they don't pass the assessment, they will die, and there are very few Ultimate Extreme Realm Masters who will be so dangerous.

Of course, they don't dare to complain about the Doomsday Extreme, that is the ultimate Extreme, if they dare to complain, the Doomsday Extreme Zun hears it, and they will directly wipe them out in the air.

Time passed slowly, and all the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lords were contemplating, but most of the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Masters had no clue at all, they all frowned, and became more and more impatient.

After all, if you can't get out, that's the life of being killed in seconds, who isn't nervous?

......

Doomsday Prison, really very complicated, this seems to be a prison, but in fact it is an ultimate killing move, you need to find out the shortcomings of the ultimate killing move, starting from the shortcomings, and then create a targeted ultimate killing move, in order to break through the Doomsday Prison. "

"Different doomsday prisons are equivalent to different ultimate killing moves, and the shortcomings are also different, some are more, some are less, and some even have no shortcomings. "

"If you choose a doomsday prison without any shortcomings, it is equivalent to looking for death!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the doomsday prison he chose, there are still shortcomings, he has found one at the moment, but there must be more than one, but even if he only finds one, directly smashing this one, he can break the entire doomsday prison.

Next, he has to create the ultimate killer move that can break the prison of doom based on this shortcoming.
